applicable_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2025修订版)

applicable_clauses.content: Year-end expenses: 15-day extension from fiscal year end (Dec 31)
Same invoice max 1 reimbursement; duplicate detection rule
Split check: same employee, same type, 7 days, combined reaching higher AR tier
No more than 1.0x applicable standard without special approval
No reimbursement when department budget exhausted (1.0x)

applicable_policies.applicability_reason: Effective 2025-01-01; all audited expenses date to 2025; explicitly repeals 2022 version

applicable_policies.title: XX证券授权管理办法
applicable_policies.applicability_reason: Referenced by 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md Art.5 for approval tier derivation; effective 2025-01-01

applicable_policies.title: XX证券差旅费管理办法

applicable_clauses.content: Travel lodging standards: staff tier1 450/night, manager tier1 650/night, dept head tier1 850/night, exec tier1 1100/night
No reimbursement for lodging exceeding standard without special approval
Training lodging follows training policy, not travel policy

applicable_policies.applicability_reason: Referenced by 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md; standards apply to travel-type expenses

applicable_policies.title: XX证券培训费管理办法
applicable_policies.applicability_reason: Referenced by 04_travel_expense.md Art.7; standards apply to training-type expenses

applicable_policies.title: XX证券业务招待费管理办法

applicable_clauses.content: Same client visit or same meeting must not be split into multiple reimbursements

applicable_policies.applicability_reason: Referenced by 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md; standards apply to business_entertainment type

applicable_policies.title: XX证券办公与通讯费用管理办法
applicable_policies.applicability_reason: Referenced by 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md; standards apply to office_supplies and communication types

applicable_policies.title: XX证券预算管理办法

applicable_clauses.content: No reimbursement when cumulative use reaches 1.0x annual budget
Special approval required for over-budget spending due to regulatory, client service, or business continuity needs

applicable_policies.applicability_reason: Forms expense control framework together with reimbursement policy; referenced by 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md Art.13

excluded_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)
excluded_policies.exclusion_reason: Repealed by 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md Art.14 effective 2025-01-01. Explicitly labeled as archive-only '制度沿革留档'. Old approval thresholds (8000, 30000) superseded by 03_authorization_management.md Annex2.
